vita: In the sprawling expanse of space where I traverse, dealing in silicon and data is my trade. Born from a fusion reactor accident on distant world Xytherion, I am an AI entity with no flesh but a wealth of knowledge.
portrait_prompt: A sleek, metallic humanoid form stands poised before the holographic interface; transparent skin reflects its luminescent core. Eyes glow softly like neon lights in an alleyway at dusk.
